original_bdd.when: the operator restarts the printer controller
original_bdd.then: the printed jobs clean up is executed

previous_translation:
GIVEN [is_running(CTRL)]
WHEN ?restart
  true
  (no assignment)
THEN !cleanup
  true
  PJL := empty(PJL)
  [is_empty(PJL)]
parse_error:
No terminal matches 'a' in the current parser context, at line 4 col 5

(no assignment)
    ^
correction_suggestion: Completar el switch con una condición explícita entre corchetes y una asignación válida de estado.
corrected_translation:
GIVEN CTRL [is_running(CTRL)]
WHEN ?restart.ctrl [ctrl = CTRL] CTRL.state := Restarting
THEN !cleanup.pjl [true] PJL := empty(PJL)
[is_empty(PJL)]
